# Chas Everitt (South Africa)

> Homepage-visible link inventory for Chas Everitt (South Africa), focused on property search plus buying, renting, selling, agents, calculators, news, recruitment, services, legal, partners, and social channels.

_This `llms-full.txt` is based on the attached homepage HTML and the destinations visibly linked from that page, including primary navigation, homepage CTAs, and footer/reference links. It is not a full-site crawl._


## Primary Entry Points
- [Chas Everitt South Africa](https://www.chaseveritt.co.za/) - Main homepage.
- [Buy](https://www.chaseveritt.co.za/buyers/) - Buyer landing page.
- [Sell](https://www.chaseveritt.co.za/sellers/) - Seller landing page.
- [Rent](https://www.chaseveritt.co.za/tenants/) - Tenant and rental landing page.
- [On Show](https://www.chaseveritt.co.za/on-show/) - On-show search entry point.
- [Development Showcase](https://www.chaseveritt.co.za/development-showcase/) - Property developments.
- [Luxury](https://luxury.chaseveritt.co.za/) - Luxury property site.
- [Zimbabwe](https://www.chaseveritt.co.zw/) - Zimbabwe sister site.


## Search, Discovery, and Contact
- [Residential for Sale](https://www.chaseveritt.co.za/results/residential/for-sale/) - Residential sale listings.
- [Residential to Let](https://www.chaseveritt.co.za/results/residential/to-let/) - Residential rental listings.
- [Commercial to Let](https://www.chaseveritt.co.za/results/commercial/to-let/) - Commercial rental listings.
- [Vacant Land](https://www.chaseveritt.co.za/results/vacant-land/) - Vacant land listings.
- [On Show Results](https://www.chaseveritt.co.za/results/on-show/) - On-show listings.
- [Area Profiles](https://www.chaseveritt.co.za/area-profiles/) - Area and suburb discovery.
- [Property Email Alerts](https://www.chaseveritt.co.za/property-email-alerts/) - Property alert sign-up.
- [Agents](https://www.chaseveritt.co.za/agents/) - Agent search.
- [Offices](https://www.chaseveritt.co.za/offices/) - Office search.
- [Contact](https://www.chaseveritt.co.za/contact/) - General contact page.


## Seller and Buyer Tools
- [Price My Property](https://www.chaseveritt.co.za/sellers/#sell-form-container) - Property valuation request entry point.
- [List Your Home Online](https://www.chaseveritt.co.za/electronic-authority-to-list/) - Online listing start page.
- [Calculators](https://www.chaseveritt.co.za/calculators/) - Property finance calculators.
- [Fraud Prevention](https://www.chaseveritt.co.za/fraud-prevention/) - Anti-fraud guidance.
- [FICA FAQs](https://www.chaseveritt.co.za/fica-faqs/) - FICA information.
